title: rubus capitulatus
intro: Rubus capitulatus, also known as the Japanese raspberry, is a species of bramble in the rose family that is native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus capitulatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Rubus capitulatus can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
